positive: A whimsical, stylized forest scene viewed through a geometric cutout, featuring anthropomorphic woodland animals (a wise owl, a friendly fox, and a gentle deer) gathered around a glowing, oversized mystical lantern. The composition should be centered and balanced, with clean, distinct silhouettes against a gradient sky of soft teal and lavender. Art style: Flat vector illustration combined with deep linework, reminiscent of modern Scandinavian folk art and stained glass stained glass. Palette: Limited, jewel-toned palette with high contrast between the subjects and the background light source. Perfect for repeat pattern or isolated print. Linework should be crisp and uniform.
negative: photorealistic, grainy, noise, blur, artifact, text, watermark, signature, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn hands, mutated
